Work style assessment · 6 dimensions

Every person sees through a different lens

KLEIDO reveals your natural work pattern across six dimensions. Not a type. Not a box. A full spectrum — uniquely yours.

Take the free assessment Explore the dimensions

K

Knowledge

How you take in and apply new information

Experiential  ↔  Studied

The six dimensions

What KLEIDO reveals

Each dimension is a spectrum, not a label. Your KLEIDO profile shows where you naturally fall — and what that means for how you work best.

K
Knowledge
How you take in and apply new information
Experiential Studied
L
Load
How you organise and structure your work
Fluid Systematic
E
Exchange
How you give and receive feedback under pressure
Absorb React
I
Interaction
Where you draw energy — solo focus or collaboration
Deep solo Collaborative
D
Drive
What motivates your best work
Impact Autonomy
O
Output
Your natural delivery rhythm and pace
Deep quality Fast iteration

How it works

Simple. Practical.
Actually useful.

No abstract types. No 40-page PDF you'll never read. Just your spectrum and what to do with it.

01

Take the assessment

15 minutes. Situational questions, not "rate yourself 1–5." Built around how you actually behave, not how you think you should.

02

Get your KLEIDO profile

Six dimensions rendered as your unique spectrum — with plain-language insight into what each score means in practice.

03

Apply it immediately

Practical recommendations for meeting structure, communication style, and focus rhythms — tailored to your specific profile.

04

Go deeper when you need it

Unlock a Working With guide for one person's scores, or a full Group Dynamics report for your whole team. One-time, no subscription.

Your profile

Your spectrum.
Nobody else's.

Your KLEIDO profile is a shareable snapshot — specific enough to actually change how you structure your week, and clear enough for a manager to act on in ten seconds.


The sample here shows an experiential learner with high systematic Load and strong autonomy Drive — someone who needs space to learn by doing, but wants a clear process once they know the goal.

Alex M.

KLEIDO Profile · 2025

High Autonomy
K — Knowledge Experiential (28)
L — Load Systematic (75)
E — Exchange Absorb first (35)
I — Interaction Balanced (52)
D — Drive Autonomy (84)
O — Output Deep quality (20)

Pricing

Free to start.
Pay only for more.

Your full KLEIDO profile is always free. Unlock deeper insight when you actually need it — no subscriptions, no commitment.

Always free

Your Profile

$0

Take the assessment and get your full six-dimension KLEIDO spectrum. Yours to keep and share.

  • Full 6-dimension KLEIDO profile
  • Plain-language insight report
  • Practical self-recommendations
  • Shareable profile link

One-time unlock

Working With

$4 one-time

Enter someone else's KLEIDO scores and get a personalised guide for working with them.

  • Relationship archetype
  • Communication style tips
  • Feedback and pressure advice
  • Collaboration and pace guide
  • One person's scores per unlock
Unlock for $4
One-time unlock

Group

$10 one-time

Enter scores for your whole team and receive a full group dynamics report.

  • Team tension and compatibility map
  • Natural roles within the group
  • Meeting structure recommendations
  • Communication gap analysis
  • Up to 10 people per report
